various facets of mundane astrology are
•
Elections – this means Indian parliament elections, the
USA presidential elections, UK elections or any
election in the states. Indian election is like the
Wimbledon in mundane astrology. So is USA, which is
like US open in tennis.
•
War s- basically the world has become such a peaceful
place that world wars will also become non-existent.
War between countries will be common. I had predicted
successfully the afghan war, the start of Iraq war (I
had done by September when many astrologer started
seeing trend only in the dec or Jan), post Iraq war.

•
Sports – Indians, being cricket obsessed nation, there
is constant clamoring for the matches. Of course
football, tennis, golf motor sports are also gaining
lot of importance. New research needs to be done in
theses areas.
•
Stock market s–This is also very successful area of
mine. Please understand that I have done only for
